form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Not seen since winning won by 2.25 len Wolverhampton September 20 over 1400m defeating Hello Humphrey carrying 60.5kg at $2.60. form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 44-day let-up.
